_comment: Real per-unit totals for the BASE-WEAPON faithfulness basis (docs/data/clean-weapons.md). Scored by `npx tsx scripts/clean-weapons-read.ts`. Damage = the Battle Records damage row; the crossed-swords column is COMBAT POWER, never ATK. Append a run per recording; the scorer averages by unit and reports n.

runs.focusNote: slot 3 = snow-crane, so marciana is UNFOCUSED here — her popups are unreadable in this recording (totals are still valid).
Re-recorded with marciana in slot 3 so she IS the camera focus — this is the recording the SG landing probe must use (docs/handoffs/2026-07-23-sg-landing-probe.md).
